title: Better Piglin Bartering
description: Adds a bunch of useful nether items to the bartering loot table, while keeping things balanced!
body:
Make the most of your gold with this data pack!

Adds the following items to the loot table pool:
  
New book enchantments: mending, fire aspect, fire protection, silk touch, efficiency, unbreaking

Magma cream 1-4

Crimson and warped stem

Shroomlight

Basalt

Blue and red nether wart blocks

Netherite scrap

Netherite ingot

Snout armor trim

Netherite upgrade template

Removes splash potions of fire resistance, water bottles and iron boots
